data.content: Plan written. Implementation adds a Refine Scope button to BulkEditControls in filter-bar.tsx, wired through a new handleRefineScope callback in use-beat-actions.ts that fires parallel refineBeatScope() API calls for each selected beat. No new API endpoints needed. 4 files touched, ~50-80 lines new code. Key risk: no batch API (acceptable at typical selection sizes). See plan note for full details.
